fields.label: AppLocker audit/block events

column.name: AppLockerEvents
column.description: AppLocker audited and denied execution events from the last 24h, enriched from the on-disk file (description, version, product, SHA-256 hash, publisher, rule XML). Files no longer present are skipped. Includes EventRecordId for KQL dedup (AppLockerEventRecordId + DeviceName).

column.name: AppLockerEventRecordId
column.description: Per-log EventRecordId of the source event. Combine with DeviceName to dedupe overlapping uploads in KQL.

column.name: AppLockerEventType
column.description: Audited (would have been blocked in audit mode) or Denied (blocked in enforce mode).

column.name: AppLockerEventMessage
column.description: Full text of the Windows AppLocker event log message.

column.name: AppLockerRuleType
column.description: AppLocker rule type the event came from: Application (EXE/DLL) or Script (MSI/Script).

column.name: AppLockerFileDescription
column.description: File description from the file VersionInfo; falls back to the file name.

column.name: AppLockerFileVersion
column.description: File version from the file VersionInfo; Unavailable if not present.

column.name: AppLockerProductName
column.description: Product name from the file VersionInfo; falls back to the file description.

column.name: AppLockerFileHash
column.description: SHA-256 hash of the file computed with Get-FileHash.

column.name: AppLockerFileName
column.description: Leaf file name parsed from the event file path.

column.name: AppLockerFilePath
column.description: Full path of the file (with %OSDRIVE% expanded to the system drive).

column.name: AppLockerFileLength
column.description: File size in bytes.

column.name: AppLockerPublisher
column.description: Short publisher name (the O= organisation component of the certificate subject); Unsigned for unsigned files.

column.name: AppLockerFullPublisher
column.description: Full AppLocker publisher string from Get-AppLockerFileInformation (complete certificate subject); N/A for unsigned files.

column.name: AppLockerFileUseCount
column.description: Number of AppLocker events seen for this file path in the 24-hour collection window.

column.name: AppLockerPublisherRule
column.description: Ready-to-use AppLocker publisher rule XML from New-AppLockerPolicy; Unsigned Application if the file is unsigned.

column.name: AppLockerHashRule
column.description: Ready-to-use AppLocker hash rule XML from New-AppLockerPolicy.

column.name: AppLockerPathRule
column.description: Ready-to-use AppLocker path rule XML from New-AppLockerPolicy.

column.name: AppLockerSigned
column.description: Yes if the file has a publisher (signed), No if unsigned.
